[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 100000111 4
2 101000101 4
3 101110000 4
4 111101111 8
5 011110000 4
6 110000101 4
7 011011110 6

01 10 101000111 5
12 21 101110101 6
23 32 111111111 a
34 43 111111111 a
45 54 111110101 7
56 65 111011111 8
67 76 011011110 6 match 7
70 07 111001111 7

02 20 101110111 7
13 31 111101111 8 match 4
24 42 111110000 5
35 53 111101111 8 match 4
46 64 011111110 7
57 75 111001101 6
60 06 111011111 8
71 17 111001101 6

03 30 111101111 8 match 4
14 41 111110101 7

36 63 111111111 a
47 74 011111000 5
50 05 110000111 5
61 16 111011111 8
72 27 111111000 6

15 51 111000101 5
26 62 111111110 8
37 73 111101111 8 match 4
